cards.front: What is the purpose of the word count program?
cards.back: To count the number of occurrences of each word in a given text.
A distributed computing framework that processes large data sets in parallel across a cluster of nodes.
An in-memory data processing engine that provides high-performance processing for large data sets.

cards.front: What is the main difference between Hadoop and Spark?
cards.back: Hadoop is a batch processing framework, while Spark is an in-memory, real-time processing engine.

cards.front: What is the MapReduce algorithm in Hadoop?
cards.back: A programming model for processing large data sets in parallel across a cluster of nodes, using a map function and a reduce function.
